rationale: For 'Future Skills Summer Camp 2026', a standard bright/pastel kids theme feels too childish and generic. To convey 'Future Skills', 'Robotics', and 'AI', we are using Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) tailored for youth. The base is an ultra-deep Navy instead of black to maintain trust and approachability, paired with high-energy Neon Cyan and vibrant Red. This establishes a premium, futuristic, and exciting mood that appeals to both tech-enthusiast kids and their parents.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F8FAFC] to-[#94A3B8]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#F8FAFC] font-['Unbounded']
typography.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#F8FAFC] font-['Unbounded']
typography.h4: text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#00E5FF] font-['Unbounded']
typography.label: text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#00E5FF] font-['Outfit']
typography.instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Unbounded' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts. Apply them explicitly. Do NOT use Inter for any headings.

layout_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
layout_spacing.instructions_to_main_agent: Generous spacing is critical. Use p-8 or p-10 inside cards. Do not cram elements.

visual_enhancers.neon_border: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-[#00E5FF] before:to-transparent before:-z-10 before:rounded-2xl
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Implement framer-motion linear gradient border tracking around pricing/booking cards.
visual_enhancers.button_primary: bg-[#D63031] hover:bg-[#FF3366] text-white font-black py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(214,48,49,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,51,102,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 font-['Unbounded'] tracking-wide
visual_enhancers.button_secondary: bg-[#1E3A5F]/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#00E5FF]/50 text-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)]
visual_enhancers.badge_urgency: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-[#D63031]/20 border border-[#D63031] text-[#FF3366] text-sm font-bold animate-pulse uppercase tracking-widest

offerings_page_card.layout: Wide horizontal card or large square component for the main Offerings page.
offerings_page_card.styling: Vibrant, animated banner card. Use the abstract_neon_bg image with a dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60 to bg-black/20). Glowing borders. Hover state: slight scale up (scale-105) and increased border glow shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)].

age_selector_modal.layout: Grid of 3 cards: 'Little Explorers (4-8)', 'Tech Creators (9-12)', 'Future Innovators (13-16)'.
age_selector_modal.styling: Dark glassmorphism overlay. Cards should have hover lift and cyan/red glowing borders on hover. Use abstract images as subtle backgrounds inside the cards.

hero_section.layout: Asymmetrical layout. Left: Staggered typography (H1), floating tech badges, Date (May 1), CTA 'Book Your Spot — ₹1,999'. Right: 3D AI Brain floating with framer-motion, glowing backdrop.
hero_section.styling: Deep navy background #080C16 with subtle grid or cyber lines. Ensure hero text has text-shadow for readability.

subjects_bento.layout: Tetris bento grid. 1 Large card (Robotics) col-span-12 md:col-span-8, 1 Tall card (AI) col-span-12 md:col-span-4 md:row-span-2, 2 Small cards (Coding, 3D Design) col-span-12 md:col-span-4.
subjects_bento.styling: Glassmorphic cards bg-[#1E3A5F]/40, large bold watermark numbers (01, 02) in text-white/5, neon accent icons (Phosphor icons). Embed real kid-coding images in the Robotics/Coding cards with opacity 0.8 and mix-blend-screen or hard-light to merge with the neon theme.

schedule_centers.layout: Tabs for Weekday vs Weekend batches. 4 location cards (Mira Road, Dombivli Pallava, Andheri West, Online) mapped to the selected schedule.
schedule_centers.styling: Tabs using neon cyan active states. Location cards should use neon-outlined borders. Online should have a distinct 'Live' glowing red dot.

pricing_urgency.layout: Centered massive pricing block inside a glowing container. List of what's included.
pricing_urgency.styling: Massive text text-[10vw] md:text-8xl for ₹1,999. Use Tracing Beam effect for the container. Include a pulsing red 'Only 10 spots per batch' badge using badge_urgency styles.

booking_form.layout: 2-column layout for desktop. Left: Summary of selection (Age group, Batch schedule, Location). Right: Multi-step or long form (Parent Name, Child Name, Phone, Email, Location Select) ending in Payment button.
booking_form.styling: Shadcn Form heavily customized. Inputs with dark backgrounds bg-[#080C16]/50, cyan focus rings focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-[#00E5FF]. High contrast white text for typed input.

framer_motion.hero_floating: animate-y: [0, -20, 0], transition: { duration: 4, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'easeInOut' }
framer_motion.staggered_entrance: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, staggerChildren: 0.1

hero_3d_ai.description: 3D AI Brain icon for hero section floating element. Use on the right side of the hero.

kids_robotics_1.description: Children interacting with large robot. Use inside the Robotics Bento card.

kids_robotics_2.description: Kids collaborating on robotics. Use as social proof or hero background overlay.

kids_coding.description: Boy coding. Use inside the Coding Bento card.

abstract_neon_bg.description: Luminous 3D geometric shapes. Use as section background with 10-20% opacity and multiply/overlay blend, or for the main Offerings page card.

abstract_blue_display.description: Futuristic blue digital display. Use as background for Tech Creators / Future Innovators modal cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for tech icons (Robot, Code, Brain, Cube, MapPin, Calendar, etc).
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations and floating effects on the hero image.
Implement the UI with pure Tailwind and Shadcn customized to match the dark neon theme. Provide fully developed components.
Ensure the 'Only 10 spots' text pulses and uses the primary brand red (#D63031) for urgency.
In the age selector modal, use the abstract backgrounds with heavy backdrop-blur and a #080C16/80 overlay to ensure text readability.
Make sure forms don't look like generic white SaaS forms; use dark inputs with high contrast white text.
